Powered by 

Create a Customer (Tier 0)

post
https://api.maplerad.com/v1/customers

This resource enables the creation of a new customer. A customer ID is returned which can be used for further actions within the Maplerad ecosystem.

Body Params
string
required
Defaults to John
string
required
Defaults to Doe
string
required
Defaults to johndoe@example.com
string
required
Defaults to NG

The country of origin of the customer.

Responses

Updated 6 months ago

Upgrade Customer (Tier 1)
Language
Credentials
Header
xxxxxxxxxx

                                                

                                                    
12

                                                

                                            

                                            

                                            

                                            

                                            

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
1

                                                    

                                                    
curl --request POST \

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
2

                                                    

                                                    
     --url https://api.maplerad.com/v1/customers \

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
3

                                                    

                                                    
     --header 'accept: application/json' \

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
4

                                                    

                                                    
     --header 'content-type: application/json' \

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
5

                                                    

                                                    
     --data '

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
6

                                                    

                                                    
{

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
7

                                                    

                                                    
  "first_name": "John",

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
8

                                                    

                                                    
  "last_name": "Doe",

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
9

                                                    

                                                    
  "email": "johndoe@example.com",

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
10

                                                    

                                                    
  "country": "NG"

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
11

                                                    

                                                    
}

                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                        
12

                                                    

                                                    
'
Response
Click Try It! to start a request and see the response here! Or choose an example:
application/json
